title: Matzo Brei
description: A traditional Jewish dish made with matzo and eggs. This recipe serves a crowd and can be made with leftover matzo.
instructions: Soak the matzo in water for 5 minutes, then drain and tear into small pieces.
In a large skillet, sauté the chopped onion in oil until softened.
Add the beaten eggs to the skillet and scramble until cooked through.
Add the torn matzo, flour, salt, and pepper to the skillet and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the matzo is crispy.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped parsley.
